sql:
SELECT 
            ALARMNO
            , SYSNAME
            , TO_CHAR(ALARMTIME , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ALARMTIME
            , ALARMLOC
            , ALARMMSG
            , ALARMMSG_ORIGINAL
            , TICKET_ID
            , TICKET_TYPE
            , TICKET_GENERATION_TIME
            , FAULT_TIME
            , ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE
            , COALESCE(ROOT_CAUSE_DOMAIN, '기타') AS ROOT_CAUSE_DOMAIN
            , TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT
            , STATUS
            , TICKET_RCA_RESULT_CODE
            , TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE
            , TICKET_UPDATE_TIME
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                AC.ALARMNO
                , AC.SYSNAME
                , AC.ALARMTIME
                , AC.ALARMLOC
                , AC.ALARMMSG
                , AC.ALARMMSG_ORIGINAL
                , RT.TICKET_ID
                , RT.TICKET_TYPE
                , TO_CHAR(RT.TICKET_GENERATION_TIME , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS TICKET_GENERATION_TIME
                , TO_CHAR(RT.FAULT_TIME , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS FAULT_TIME
                , RT.ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE
                , RT.ROOT_CAUSE_DOMAIN
                , RT.TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT
                , RT.STATUS
                , RT.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_CODE
                , RT.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE
                , TO_CHAR(RT.TICKET_UPDATE_TIME , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS TICKET_UPDATE_TIME
            FROM rca.tb_alarm_cur_mst AC
            LEFT JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current AL ON AC.ALARMNO = AL.ROOT_CAUSE_ALARM_NOA
            LEFT JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_current RT ON RT.TICKET_ID = AL.TICKET_ID 
            WHERE ALARMNO LIKE 'T%' 
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 
                NULL ALARMNO
                , AL.root_cause_sysnamea SYSNAME
                , TICKET_GENERATION_TIME AS ALARMTIME
                , AL.root_cause_porta ALARMLOC
                , TC.root_cause_type AS ALARMMSG
                , NULL ALARMMSG_ORIGINAL
                , TC.TICKET_ID
                , TC.TICKET_TYPE
                , TO_CHAR(TC.TICKET_GENERATION_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS' ) AS TICKET_GENERATION_TIME
                , TO_CHAR(TC.FAULT_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS FAULT_TIME
                , TC.ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE
                , TC.ROOT_CAUSE_DOMAIN
                , TC.TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT
                , TC.STATUS
                , TC.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_CODE
                , TC.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE
                , TO_CHAR(TC.TICKET_UPDATE_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS TICKET_UPDATE_TIME
            FROM RCA.TB_RCA_TICKET_CURRENT TC
            LEFT OUTER JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current AL ON AL.TICKET_ID = TC.TICKET_ID
            WHERE TICKET_TYPE = 'PF'
        ) T
        WHERE 1=1
                AND ALARMTIME   >    NOW() - INTERVAL '14' DAY
        ORDER BY ALARMTIME DESC
